questions.question: What is tree-shaking?
options: Removing unused code from a production bundle
questions.explanation: Tree-shaking helps keep the final bundle smaller by excluding code that is never used.

questions.question: What does code splitting do?
options: Breaks a large bundle into smaller pieces loaded on demand
Merges CSS and JavaScript into one file
questions.explanation: Code splitting helps you avoid loading everything up front.

questions.question: Why do frontend teams care about asset pipelines?
options: They affect how images, fonts, and code are delivered to users
They only matter for backend APIs
questions.explanation: Asset handling is part of build performance and production delivery.

questions.question: What is one benefit of lazy loading?
options: Smaller initial download and faster startup
questions.explanation: Lazy loading delays non-essential work until the user actually needs it.
